user.title: HelioZero
user.description: Connect to one router REST API (MQTT remains the default). Add the integration again for each additional router. After setup, use **Configure** for integration mode and refresh interval; use **Reconfigure** (⋮ menu) to change the router URL or API token.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure HelioZero
reconfigure.description: Change the router base URL or API token. Leave API token empty to keep the current token.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot reach /api/v1/public on the router (check URL and network)

abort.already_configured: This router URL is already configured

init.title: HelioZero options
init.description: Lower refresh interval = more responsive sensors; higher = less load on the router LAN.
